case_title: MARC FAVRO VS. SHANGHAI 1930 RESTAURANT PARTNERS, L.P., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAVRO, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT SHANGHAI 1930 RESTAURANT PARTNERS, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
